mapper.select: SELECT id, email, password, nickname AS nickName, deleted FROM member WHERE email = #{email} AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO member(email, password, nickname, deleted) VALUES (#{email}, #{password}, #{nickName}, 0)
mapper.select: SELECT id, nickname AS nickName, email, password, deleted FROM member WHERE email = #{email} AND deleted = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE member SET deleted = 1 WHERE email = #{email} AND deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM member WHERE deleted = 0
SELECT id, email, nickname AS nickName, role, deleted FROM member WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT id, email, nickname AS nickName, role, deleted FROM member WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 5
